subTitle: A game show called Mathura's Funniest Videos offers a prize money of 10,000 rupees for the funniest video. So the children at the orphanage start to prank each other on camera to win the money.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera sets up a prank in order to scare Rinky-Pinky on her birthday. But when the prank makes her cry, Titoo decides to give Shera a taste of his own medicine.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo causes a water crisis in his entire building after turning off the water pump. So, his parents tell him to ask before doing anything but soon get annoyed when he asks too many questions.

title: Titoo
subTitle: To annoy Titoo, Shera throws water on his homework, ruining it completely. But Titoo tells Shera's father about what he did and makes sure that Shera is punished.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo gets annoyed when his mother does not allow him to watch his cartoons as she wants to watch a soap opera. So he comes up with a plan to make her stop watching soap operas.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera puts something in Golu's drink to make him lose his voice before the town singing competition. But when Titoo comes to know about this, he steps in to save Golu from embarrassment.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo and his friends enter into a kite competition where they try different ways to beat their opponents. However, things take a turn when the winners are announced.

title: Titoo
subTitle: During the Holi celebrations, Shera is challenged to a spirited watercolour competition by Titoo. But soon chaos ensues as they both go all out to win.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo, an inspiring eight-year-old boy, wishes to help everyone in need. However, his attempts only get him into trouble.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo chases a troublemaker cat into an abandoned building only to discover its litter of kittens. So he tries to convince people that the building is haunted to keep the cat and its family safe.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera's cousin transfers to his school and starts troubling him. However, Shera tries different ways to make his cousin to trouble Titoo and his brother instead.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo fakes being ill in order to go to a movie premiere instead of school. But his mother thinks he is deathly ill and decides to admit him to the hospital.

title: Titoo
subTitle: During a friendly game of cricket between Shera and Titoo, Shera is knocked unconscious. But when he wakes up he seems to think that he is a five-year-old boy.

subTitle: Krish, the reincarnation of Lord Krishna, is sent to safeguard the children of Mathura orphanage. There, he fights against the evil principal, Kanishk, in his own mischievous and inimitable way.

subTitle: Kris and his friends decide to go to the fun fair that is set up as part of the school's 25th anniversary. Meanwhile Kanishk decides to send out his minions to ruin the day for Kris and his friends.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Annoyed by how much Titoo procrastinates, his mother warns him to learn to do things on time or face punishment. So in order to spite her, Titoo decides to ignore all the work that he had to do.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo brings home a stray puppy he found on the street, but Golu is deathly afraid of dogs. So Titoo sets out to help Golu conquer his fears.

title: Titoo
subTitle: In order to annoy Shera, Golu claims that Titoo is actually the topper in class. So now, in order to not humiliate Golu, Titoo is forced to ace the exams and prove him right.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's mother starts to put pressure on him to make sure that her dream of him becoming a doctor comes true. But Titoo turns it around on her by misdiagnosing people and showing her she was wrong.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo, his brother, Shera and the secretary uncle miss the train after a robber steals their luggage. Later, they face many misadventures when they encounter Chavangi Gang in a goods train.

subTitle: When Titoo's mother is annoyed by how much Titoo talks, he decides to take a vow of silence until his mother is satisfied. But soon Titoo's attempts to communicate using non verbal signs causes chaos.
